api: user: delta (change tracking for Microsoft Entra users)

notes: The id property is always returned by the service even when $select omits it.
$expand, $top and $orderby are not supported on users/delta.
Query parameters are specified once, in the initial request only; the service encodes them into every later state token.

required_headers.Authorization: Bearer {access-token} on every request, including @odata.nextLink and @odata.deltaLink follow-ups

rules: A page contains either @odata.nextLink or @odata.deltaLink, never both.
@odata.nextLink URLs carry an opaque $skiptoken; @odata.deltaLink URLs carry an opaque $deltatoken.
State-token URLs must be used verbatim: do not decode, rebuild, or re-append query parameters such as $select. The mock rejects any follow-up whose raw query string differs from the link it issued.
Keep requesting @odata.nextLink until a @odata.deltaLink arrives; only a @odata.deltaLink completes a round.
changed = soft-deleted (restorable from deletedItems); deleted = permanently gone. Both are tombstones for a synchronizer.
Tombstones can appear in any page, including the initial enumeration; a tombstone for an id the store never saw must be ignored, not an error.
The same entity may appear more than once in a round (replays); the last occurrence wins.
Wait exactly the Retry-After number of seconds (via the injected delay), then repeat the identical URL.
At most max_retries retries per request, then surface a throttled error carrying the last Retry-After value.
A 410 Gone response carries a Location header with a full-resynchronization URL (the delta path with an empty $deltatoken).
The client must restart enumeration from the Location URL verbatim and rebuild its local state from scratch: users absent from the fresh enumeration must disappear from the store.

commit_rules: The store's users and deltaLink advance together, atomically, only after a round completes with a @odata.deltaLink.
If a round aborts (throttling retries exhausted, API error), the store must be byte-identical to its pre-round state.
